accordion.name: Accordion
accordion.description: Vertically stacked collapsible sections that expand to reveal content.

affix.name: Affix
affix.description: Pins an element to the viewport edge as the user scrolls.

agent-message-list.name: AgentMessageList
agent-message-list.description: Chat message stream for AI agents with role-based styling.

alert.name: Alert
alert.description: Inline callout for status, warning, or informational messages.

alert-dialog.name: AlertDialog
alert-dialog.description: Modal confirmation dialog that interrupts the user for destructive actions.

animated-beam.name: AnimatedBeam
animated-beam.description: SVG beam that traces an animated gradient path between two DOM elements.

app-bar.name: AppBar
app-bar.description: Top application bar with start, center, and end slots; sticky and elevated variants.

aspect-ratio.name: AspectRatio
aspect-ratio.description: Constrains child content to a fixed width-to-height ratio.

avatar.name: Avatar
avatar.description: Circular user image with initials fallback and status indicator.

back-to-top.name: BackToTop
back-to-top.description: Floating button that scrolls the page back to the top.

badge.name: Badge
badge.description: Small label for counts, statuses, or category tags.

bento.name: Bento
bento.description: Masonry grid for dashboard tiles and marketing feature layouts.

blur-fade.name: BlurFade
blur-fade.description: Motion primitive: blur + fade-in on mount or when in view.

border-beam.name: BorderBeam
border-beam.description: Animated gradient border beam effect for hero elements.

bottom-nav.name: BottomNav
bottom-nav.description: Mobile-first bottom navigation bar with icon items.

breadcrumb.name: Breadcrumb
breadcrumb.description: Hierarchical page path with separator characters.

button.name: Button
button.description: Versatile button with variants, sizes, icons, and loading states.

calendar.name: Calendar
calendar.description: Date picker calendar grid with single, range, and multi-select modes.

card.name: Card
card.description: Flexible container with header, content, and footer slots.

carousel.name: Carousel
carousel.description: Slide-based content rotator with autoplay and keyboard nav.

center.name: Center
center.description: Flexbox helper that centers its children on both axes.

chart.name: Chart
chart.description: Declarative chart wrapper over ECharts — 30+ types supported.

checkbox.name: Checkbox
checkbox.description: Binary input with indeterminate state and accessible label.

code.name: Code
code.description: Inline or block monospace code snippet with optional copy button.

code-editor.name: CodeEditor
code-editor.description: Source-code editor wrapping CodeMirror 6 with on-demand language packs, dark/light/auto theming, and line numbers.

collapsible.name: Collapsible
collapsible.description: Single expandable region with animated height transition.

color-picker.name: ColorPicker
color-picker.description: Hue + saturation/value picker with hex input.

combobox.name: Combobox
combobox.description: Searchable select with filtering, custom values, and grouping.
gotchas: Data-bound mode (the Items parameter) still requires <ComboboxInput /> and <ComboboxContent /> children — a bare <Combobox Items="..." /> with no children renders only an empty wrapper. Map items with ItemValue/ItemText (there is no ItemLabel parameter); items are typed as object, so the Combobox is not generic (no TItem).

command.name: Command
command.description: Command palette — keyboard-driven finder for actions.

confetti.name: Confetti
confetti.description: Burst of colored particles on demand via imperative Fire() method.

container.name: Container
container.description: Responsive max-width wrapper with consistent page padding.

context-menu.name: ContextMenu
context-menu.description: Right-click menu tied to a container element.

data-grid.name: DataGrid
data-grid.description: Enterprise grid: sort, filter, inline edit, multi-level group (client + server), pin, virtualize, export.

data-table.name: DataTable
data-table.description: Table with sorting, pagination, and row selection built in.

date-picker.name: DatePicker
date-picker.description: Calendar popover for picking a single date or range.

date-time-picker.name: DateTimePicker
date-time-picker.description: Combined date + time picker with timezone awareness.

delta.name: Delta
delta.description: Trend indicator showing delta value with up/down arrow + color.

descriptions.name: Descriptions
descriptions.description: Key-value pair list for read-only entity details.

dialog.name: Dialog
dialog.description: Modal dialog with header, content, footer, and focus trap.

dock.name: Dock
dock.description: macOS-style icon dock with cursor-proximity magnification.

drawer.name: Drawer
drawer.description: Slide-up sheet for mobile-first contextual content.

dropdown-menu.name: DropdownMenu
dropdown-menu.description: Menu button with items, separators, submenus, and checkboxes.

empty-state.name: EmptyState
empty-state.description: Illustrated placeholder for empty lists with call-to-action.

file-manager.name: FileManager
file-manager.description: Headless file and folder explorer — folder tree, breadcrumb path, list/grid views, lazy loading, inline rename, context-menu operations.

file-upload.name: FileUpload
file-upload.description: Drag-and-drop file dropzone with progress and validation.

file-viewer.name: FileViewer
file-viewer.description: Universal file preview — auto-detects type from MIME / extension and renders PDF, images, video, audio, Markdown, JSON, CSV, source code (CodeMirror), and plain text inline; unknown types fall back to a download CTA. Pluggable per-kind renderer overrides; auth-aware HttpClient hook.

filter.name: Filter
filter.description: Composable faceted filter builder with chips.

flex.name: Flex
flex.description: Flexbox wrapper exposing direction, gap, align, justify as props.

form.name: Form
form.description: EditForm wrapper with styled validation, field groups, and submit state.

gauge.name: Gauge
gauge.description: Single-value gauge with radial, arc, and linear variants and threshold colour bands.

grid.name: Grid
grid.description: CSS grid wrapper with columns + gap as props.

heading.name: Heading
heading.description: Semantic h1-h6 heading with Lumeo typographic scale.

highlighter.name: Highlighter
highlighter.description: Wraps occurrences of one or more search terms in the text with highlight marks.

hover-card.name: HoverCard
hover-card.description: Popover that opens on hover for rich previews.

icon.name: Icon
icon.description: Icon wrapper — renders the built-in LumeoIcons set (Lucide-derived) or any IconSource natively.

image.name: Image
image.description: Image with lazy-loading, loading skeleton, and error fallback.

image-compare.name: ImageCompare
image-compare.description: Before/after slider comparison for two images.

inplace-editor.name: InplaceEditor
inplace-editor.description: Click-to-edit text/number field that swaps in an input.

input.name: Input
input.description: Styled text input with label, prefix/suffix, icons, error state.

input-mask.name: InputMask
input-mask.description: Masked input for phone numbers, dates, and custom patterns.

kbd.name: Kbd
kbd.description: Keyboard shortcut glyph — renders <kbd> with styling.

kpi-card.name: KpiCard
kpi-card.description: Dashboard KPI tile showing value, label, and trend.

label.name: Label
label.description: Form label that links to a control via for/id.

link.name: Link
link.description: Styled anchor with underline + color variants.

list.name: List
list.description: Ordered/unordered list with Lumeo typographic styling.

map.name: Map
map.description: Interactive geographic map powered by MapLibre GL — markers, polylines, polygons, circles, arcs, heatmaps, legend overlays, and popups; CARTO vector basemaps, no API key required.
gotchas: MapLibre GL JS and its stylesheet are loaded at runtime from unpkg (CDN) the first time a Map mounts. For strict-CSP or air-gapped deployments, self-host them and set window.lumeoCdn = { mapLibreJs: '/your/maplibre-gl.js', mapLibreCss: '/your/maplibre-gl.css' } before the first Map renders, or run `lumeo deps install --lib maplibre` (CLI). See /docs/cdn-deps.

marquee.name: Marquee
marquee.description: Infinitely scrolling horizontal band of children.

mega-menu.name: MegaMenu
mega-menu.description: Full-width dropdown for site-wide navigation with columns.

mention.name: Mention
mention.description: Textarea with @-trigger dropdown for mentioning users.

navigation-menu.name: NavigationMenu
navigation-menu.description: Top-level site nav with animated dropdown panels.

number-input.name: NumberInput
number-input.description: Numeric input with stepper buttons and locale formatting.

number-ticker.name: NumberTicker
number-ticker.description: Animated count-up from zero to target number.

otp-input.name: OtpInput
otp-input.description: One-time password input, auto-advances between boxes.

overlay.name: Overlay
overlay.description: Low-level backdrop primitive for custom popovers and modals.

overlay-form.name: OverlayForm
gotchas:
A missing Model no longer fails silently: the EditContext is still
    deferred (EditForm crashes on a null Model + null EditContext), but instead of
    an invisible empty shell the component now renders a dev-visible diagnostic
    so the misconfiguration is obvious during development.

pagination.name: Pagination
pagination.description: Page number bar with prev/next and configurable ranges.

password-input.name: PasswordInput
password-input.description: Password field with show/hide toggle and strength meter.

pdf-viewer.name: PdfViewer
pdf-viewer.description: Inline PDF document viewer powered by pdf.js — page navigation, zoom controls, optional text search, and download.
gotchas: pdf.js and its worker are loaded at runtime from jsDelivr (CDN) the first time a PdfViewer mounts. For strict-CSP or air-gapped deployments, self-host them and set window.lumeoCdn = { pdfJs: '/your/pdf.min.mjs', pdfJsWorker: '/your/pdf.worker.min.mjs' } before the first PdfViewer renders, or run `lumeo deps install --lib pdfjs` (CLI). See /docs/cdn-deps.

pick-list.name: PickList
pick-list.description: Two-column shuttle picker — move items between lists.

pivot-grid.name: PivotGrid
pivot-grid.description: Cross-tab / pivot table that summarizes flat data into rows x columns x aggregated measures.

pop-confirm.name: PopConfirm
pop-confirm.description: Inline 'are you sure?' popover attached to a trigger.

popover.name: Popover
popover.description: Positionable floating panel with anchor and arrow.

progress.name: Progress
progress.description: Linear progress bar with determinate + indeterminate modes.

prompt-input.name: PromptInput
prompt-input.description: Multiline AI prompt textarea with submit + keyboard shortcuts.

qr-code.name: QRCode
qr-code.description: Renders a QR code SVG for a string payload.

query-builder.name: QueryBuilder
query-builder.description: Visual AND/OR predicate-tree builder; serializes to JSON or a LINQ predicate.

radio-group.name: RadioGroup
radio-group.description: Grouped radio buttons with horizontal or vertical layout.

rating.name: Rating
rating.description: Star rating input with half-star support.

reasoning-display.name: ReasoningDisplay
reasoning-display.description: Collapsible chain-of-thought block for AI reasoning traces.

resizable.name: Resizable
resizable.description: Draggable splitter for resizable panel layouts.

result.name: Result
result.description: Full-page success/error/info status screen with actions.

rich-text-editor.name: RichTextEditor
rich-text-editor.description: WYSIWYG editor wrapping TipTap with Lumeo styling.

ring-progress.name: RingProgress
ring-progress.description: Circular determinate progress ring with optional centre label or custom content.

scrollspy.name: Scrollspy
scrollspy.description: Highlights the nav item matching the current scroll section.

select.name: Select
select.description: Native-feeling styled dropdown with search and groups.
gotchas: Data-bound mode (the Items parameter) still requires <SelectTrigger /> and <SelectContent /> children — a bare <Select Items="..." /> with no children shows only an empty field. Map items with ItemValue/ItemText; items are typed as object, so the data-bound Select is not generic.

sheet.name: Sheet
gotchas: No inner scroll container by default — the panel is a flex-col, so a long body overflows the viewport. Wrap the scrollable region in flex-1 overflow-y-auto, or use OverlayForm which bakes that in.

shimmer-button.name: ShimmerButton
shimmer-button.description: Button with animated shimmer border beam.

sidebar.name: Sidebar
sidebar.description: Collapsible app sidebar with groups, menu, and trigger.

skeleton.name: Skeleton
skeleton.description: Pulsing placeholder block for loading states.

slider.name: Slider
slider.description: Range slider with single and dual thumb modes.

spacer.name: Spacer
spacer.description: Flex-grow spacer that pushes siblings apart.

spark-card.name: SparkCard
spark-card.description: Small dashboard card with an inline sparkline chart.

sparkline.name: Sparkline
sparkline.description: Inline SVG trend chart primitive — line, area, or bars for tables and KPI strips.

speed-dial.name: SpeedDial
speed-dial.description: Floating action button that fans out sub-actions.

spinner.name: Spinner
spinner.description: Indeterminate loading spinner with size variants.

splitter.name: Splitter
splitter.description: Resizable split pane for horizontal/vertical layouts.

stack.name: Stack
stack.description: Vertical flex wrapper with gap prop.

statistic.name: Statistic
statistic.description: Big-number statistic display with label and unit.

stepper.name: Stepper
stepper.description: Stateful multi-step wizard with navigation, validation gating, and header indicators.

steps.name: Steps
steps.description: Numbered step indicator for wizards and progress flows.

streaming-text.name: StreamingText
streaming-text.description: Token-by-token streaming text renderer for AI responses.

table.name: Table
table.description: Minimal styled HTML table with header, row, cell components.

tabs.name: Tabs
tabs.description: Tabbed content with keyboard nav and animated active indicator.

tag-input.name: TagInput
tag-input.description: Input that turns entries into removable tag chips.

text.name: Text
text.description: Paragraph text with size, color, weight props.

textarea.name: Textarea
textarea.description: Multiline text input with auto-resize option.

theme-switcher.name: ThemeSwitcher
theme-switcher.description: Color-scheme picker that writes to ThemeService.

timeline.name: Timeline
timeline.description: Vertical event timeline with icons and connectors.

toast.name: Toast
toast.description: Notification toast — renders from ToastService queue.

toggle-group.name: ToggleGroup
toggle-group.description: Group of toggles with single or multiple selection.

tool-call-card.name: ToolCallCard
tool-call-card.description: AI tool-invocation card showing call + result.

toolbar.name: Toolbar
toolbar.description: Horizontal toolbar container with separator, spacer, and group sub-components.

tooltip.name: Tooltip
tooltip.description: Hover/focus tooltip with arrow and configurable placement.

transfer.name: Transfer
transfer.description: Dual-list transfer picker — left/right with arrows.

tree-select.name: TreeSelect
tree-select.description: Select input with a hierarchical tree dropdown.

tree-view.name: TreeView
tree-view.description: Hierarchical tree with expand/collapse and selection.

window.name: Window
window.description: Non-modal draggable and resizable floating panel with minimize and maximize support.
